name: tristanmanchester--todoist-api-skill
description: Manages Todoist tasks, projects, sections, labels, comments, completed-task reports, activity logs, ID migration, project templates, and sync workflows through Todoist API v1. Use when the user asks to capture tasks, quick-add work, triage an inbox, resolve Todoist names to IDs, bulk-close or move tasks, add repeated comments, review completed work, manage project structure, export templates, or automate Todoist workflows.
